---
title: "Portfolio"
pagetitle: "Portfolio – ModernDive, R Packages & Data Science Apps"
description: "Books, apps, packages, and projects from Chester Ismay — including ModernDive and tools for teaching statistics and data science."
image: images/social-card.png
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
---

## Books

<div class="book-grid">

<div class="book-card">
  <a href="https://www.moderndive.com/v2" target="_blank">
    ![ModernDive Book Cover](images/moderndive_v2_cover.jpg){.book-cover}
  </a>
  <div class="book-text">
  **[Statistical Inference via Data Science](https://www.moderndive.com/v2)**  
  
  Co-authored with [Albert Y. Kim](https://rudeboybert.github.io/) and [Arturo Valdivia](https://stat.indiana.edu/about/core-faculty/core-faculty/valdivia-arturo.html), this free online book teaches statistics via computation and data science fundamentals using R and the tidyverse.  
  
  [→ Print edition](https://www.routledge.com/Statistical-Inference-via-Data-Science-A-ModernDive-into-R-and-the-Tidyverse/Ismay-Kim-Valdivia/p/book/9781032708379)
  </div>
</div>

<div class="book-card">
  <a href="https://rbasics.netlify.app" target="_blank">
    ![Getting Used to R Book Cover](images/rbasics-ai-cover.png){.book-cover}
  </a>
  <div class="book-text">
  **[Getting Used to R, RStudio, and R Markdown](https://rbasics.netlify.app)**  
  
  A hands-on, beginner-friendly guide to using R and RStudio for data analysis. Co-authored with [Patrick Kennedy](https://news.uoregon.edu/expert/patrick-kennedy-center-teaching-and-learning). Designed to empower new users with confidence and clarity.
  </div>
</div>

</div>



---

##  Apps

### 🏟️ Sports Viewers

A family of unofficial, timezone-aware schedule and bracket viewers that run entirely in your browser — game times in your local timezone, where to watch, live scores, standings, and calendar export. Start at the [Sports Trackers hub](https://ismayc.github.io/sports-trackers/){target="_blank"}, which shows which leagues have games today, or jump straight in:

- [**World Cup 2026**](https://ismayc.github.io/world-cup-viewer/){target="_blank"} ⚽ — every fixture across the tournament, with group standings, FIFA tie-breakers, and the knockout bracket
- [**NBA**](https://ismayc.github.io/nba-schedule/){target="_blank"} 🏀 — the full season, playoff bracket with play-in, conference standings, and league leaders
- [**WNBA**](https://ismayc.github.io/wnba-schedule/){target="_blank"} 🏀 — the WNBA season with weekly calendar, playoff bracket, and league leaders
- [**NFL**](https://ismayc.github.io/nfl-schedule/){target="_blank"} 🏈 — the 2026 week-by-week slate, standings with division seeding, and the playoff bracket
- [**Premier League**](https://ismayc.github.io/premier-league/){target="_blank"} ⚽ — fixtures, the live table with home/away splits, player leaderboards, and every final table since 1992–93
- [**Men's**](https://ismayc.github.io/mens-march-madness/){target="_blank"} and [**Women's March Madness**](https://ismayc.github.io/womens-march-madness/){target="_blank"} 🏀 — the full NCAA Division I tournament brackets, every game

Related: the [**NBA Player Finder**](https://ismayc.github.io/nba-player-finder/){target="_blank"} lets you explore current NBA rosters by conference, division, team, height, age, and jersey number. It runs entirely in your browser via shinylive, with rosters refreshed weekly from the NBA API.

### 🎓 Learning & Quiz Apps

- [**Probability Distribution Viewer**](https://ismay.shinyapps.io/ProbApp){target="_blank"} 🎲 — a Shiny app for exploring and calculating probabilities for normal, binomial, Poisson, and other distributions
- [**US State/District Shape Quiz**](https://chesterismay.shinyapps.io/us-states-quiz-app/){target="_blank"} 🦅 — an interactive quiz on US state shapes, capitals, and major cities, built with [leaflet](https://rstudio.github.io/leaflet/)
- [**German Federal State Shape Quiz**](https://chesterismay.shinyapps.io/german-states-quiz-app/){target="_blank"} 🇩🇪 — a similar quiz on the shapes and cities of Germany's federal states

### 🖥️ macOS Menu Bar Apps

- [**Text Adder**](https://ismayc.github.io/text-adder/){target="_blank"} — persistent, styled text overlays while screen sharing: lower-thirds, break timers, and quick phrases
- [**Sash**](https://github.com/ismayc/sash){target="_blank"} — snaps windows into custom layouts with drag-to-snap zones, a layout designer, and keyboard shortcuts — FancyZones for Mac

### 🗣️ AI Tools

- [**AllKlaro**](https://ismayc.github.io/AllKlaro/){target="_blank"} — live, fully local speech translation between German, English, and Spanish, powered by Whisper, Silero VAD, and Ollama on Apple Silicon

---

## Packages

I've authored or contributed to several R packages:

- [**infer**](https://infer.tidymodels.org/) — tidyverse-style statistical inference
- [**moderndive**](https://moderndive.github.io/moderndive) — companion to the ModernDive book
- [**fivethirtyeight**](https://fivethirtyeight-r.netlify.app) — access to FiveThirtyEight datasets
- [**thesisdown**](https://github.com/ismayc/thesisdown) — thesis templates in R Markdown
- [**azflights24**](https://moderndive.github.io/azflights24/) — all out-bound flights from Arizona airports (PHX, TUS, and others) in 2024
- [**nycflights23**](https://moderndive.github.io/nycflights23/) — all out-bound flights from New York City airports in 2023
- [**pnwflights22**](https://moderndive.github.io/pnwflights22/) — all out-bound flights from Seattle (SEA) and Portland (PDX) in 2022
- [**volcanoes**](https://github.com/moderndive/volcanoes) — Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program data on ~1,200 Holocene volcanoes, their eruptions, and individual events
- [**olympicAthletes**](https://github.com/moderndive/olympicAthletes) — every athlete-event participation in the modern Olympics, Athens 1896 through Milano-Cortina 2026 (~315,000 rows)
- [**exoplanets**](https://github.com/moderndive/exoplanets) — tidy data on confirmed exoplanets and their host stars from NASA's Exoplanet Archive
- [**steves**](https://github.com/moderndive/steves) — every episode of *Rick Steves' Europe* (2000–2025), with ratings, geography, air dates, and summaries
- [**izzyuntappd**](https://github.com/ismayc/izzyuntappd) — my Untappd beer check-ins (Feb 2015–June 2016), plus an R Markdown template for analyzing them

I've also authored the following Python package:

- [**moderndive**](https://moderndive.readthedocs.io) — Python companion to the ModernDive book: a tidy simulation-inference grammar, regression helpers, datasets, and dual-engine plotly/plotnine plots

---

## Projects at Reed College

### Teaching Tools
- [**Chem 101/102 R templates and tools**](https://github.com/ismayc/chemistr)  
  → [Help Manual](https://ismayc.github.io/chemistr-book)

### Educational Outreach
- [Creating a simple R Markdown template package](/ecots2k16/template_pkg.qmd)
- [EdTech blog posts at Reed](https://blogs.reed.edu/ed-tech/author/cismay/)
- [Flight data from PDX and SEA (2014)](https://github.com/ismayc/pnwflights14)
- [Reed College GitHub organization](https://github.com/Reedies)

### Faculty & Student Support
- Supported departments: Chemistry, Biology, Linguistics, Sociology, Economics, Political Science, Mathematics
- Assisted senior thesis students with data analysis and visualization
- Provided R/R Markdown training for Chem 101/102 students
